## Type of change

- [ ] CLI/API surface
- [ ] Agent-facing contract/docs
- [ ] Internal engineering/docs/CI

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `uv sync --group dev --frozen`
- [ ] Ran `uv run --frozen python scripts/check_repo_hygiene.py`
- [ ] Ran `uv run --frozen ruff format --check src/mini_articraft tests`
- [ ] Ran `uv run --frozen ruff check src/mini_articraft tests`
- [ ] Ran `uv run --frozen pytest -q`
- [ ] Ran targeted command/test: `<command>`
- [ ] Not run; reason:

Anything risky, deferred, or intentionally out of scope?
